# getActivePage(completionHandler:)

**Instance Method**

Calls the completion handler passing the active page in the tab.

## Declaration

```swift
func getActivePage(completionHandler: @escaping (SFSafariPage?) -> Void)
```

```swift
func activePage() async -> SFSafariPage?
```

## Parameters

- **completionHandler**: A block to call when the active page is retrieved.

## Discussion



## Accessing Pages

- **getPagesWithCompletionHandler(_:)**: Calls the completion handler with all of the tab’s active and preloading pages.
